data.current_description: Sends push notifications to managed devices. You can target specific devices, device groups, or broadcast to all devices.
data.summary_suggestion: Send push notifications to managed devices
data.description_suggestion: Sends push notifications to one or more managed devices in the Headwind MDM system. Supports targeting by individual device, device group, or broadcast to all devices. Requires bearer token authentication. Returns a response containing the notification delivery status and identifiers for tracking. The operation queues notifications for immediate delivery to connected devices.
